info.title: Flagsmith API
info.description: Flagsmith's Core and SDK APIs. Check out Flagsmith documentation.

get.description: Lists all environments the user has access to

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: ID of the project to filter by.

post.description: Creates a new change request for feature flag modifications in an environment.

get.description: (Beta) Lists experiment metrics for an environment. Supports search by name via the q parameter.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search metrics by name.

post.description: (Beta) Creates a metric with name, description, aggregation type, expected direction, and event definition.

get.description: (Beta) Retrieves details of a specific metric, including which experiments use it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this metric.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this metric.

get.description: (Beta) Lists experiments for an environment. Supports filtering by status and searching by experiment or feature name.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by experiment or feature name.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by experiment status (DRAFT, RUNNING, PAUSED, COMPLETED).

post.description: (Beta) Creates an experiment for a multivariate feature. Metrics can be attached inline. Only one active experiment per feature is allowed.

get.description: (Beta) Retrieves experiment details including feature configuration, attached metrics, and rollout state.

parameters.name: experiment_id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

put.description: (Beta) Updates an experiment's name or its hypothesis.

parameters.name: experiment_id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

get.description: (Beta) Retrieves variant exposure counts for an experiment. Returns null if not yet computed.

parameters.name: experiment_id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

get.description: (Beta) Retrieves statistical results for an experiment's metrics. Returns null if not yet computed.

parameters.name: experiment_id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this experiment.

post.description: Creates a segment override for a feature in an environment in a single call, setting both the segment binding and its value. Applies to environments without v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: false).

put.description: Updates a feature state in an environment, including enabled status and value. Applies to environments without v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: false).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature state.

get.description: Retrieves all change requests for an environment.

parameters.name: committed
parameters.description: Filter on the committed status of a change request.

parameters.name: feature_id
parameters.description: Filter for a particular feature.

parameters.name: live_from_after
parameters.description: Filter change requests due to go live after this datetime.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Fuzzy search across Change Request titles.

parameters.name: segment_id
parameters.description: Filter change requests which match a specific segment id.

get.description: Retrieves the count of features in each lifecycle stage for the specified environment.
Retrieves version information for a feature flag in a specific environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

post.description: Creates a new version for a feature flag in a specific environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

get.description: Retrieves feature state information for a specific version in an environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

post.description: Creates a new feature state for a specific version in an environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

put.description: Updates an existing feature state for a specific version in an environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature state.

post.description: Publishes a feature version to make it live in the environment. Applies to environments with v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: true).

get.description: Lists segment overrides for a feature in an environment.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

delete.description: Deletes a segment override. Applies to environments without v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: false).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature segment.

put.description: Updates a feature state, including its enabled status and value. Also updates a segment override's value for environments without v2 feature versioning (use_v2_feature_versioning: false).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature state.

get.description: Lists all organisations accessible with the provided user API key.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

get.description: Retrieves all permission groups within the organisation.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

get.description: Retrieves all pending invitations for the organisation.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

post.description: Send an invitation to join the organisation with specified role and permissions.

get.description: Retrieves all custom roles defined within the organisation.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

get.description: Retrieves all projects within a specified organisation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this organisation.

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive information about a specific project including configuration and statistics.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this project.

put.description: Updates project configuration settings such as the project name and feature visibility.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this project.

get.description: Retrieves all environments configured for the specified project.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this project.

get.description: Retrieves all change requests for a project.

parameters.name: committed
parameters.description: Filter on the committed status of a change request.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Fuzzy search across Change Request titles.

parameters.name: segment_id
parameters.description: Filter change requests which match a specific segment id.

get.description: Retrieves feature health monitoring events and metrics for the project.

Lists a project's feature flags (paginated). Pass `environment=<id>` to also get each feature's live state for that environment in `environment_feature_state`, along with override counts. Works for both v1 and v2 versioned environments.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: Integer ID of the environment to view features in the context of.

parameters.name: group_owners
parameters.description: Comma separated list of group owner ids to filter on

parameters.name: identity
parameters.description: ID of the identity to sort features with identity overrides first.

parameters.name: is_enabled
parameters.description: Boolean value to filter features as enabled or disabled.

parameters.name: lifecycle_stage
parameters.description:
Lifecycle stage to filter on. Requires `environment`.

* `new` - new
* `live` - live
* `stale` - stale
* `permanent` - permanent
* `needs_monitoring` - needs_monitoring
* `to_remove` - to_remove

parameters.name: owners
parameters.description: Comma separated list of owner ids to filter on

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

schema.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

parameters.name: segment
parameters.description: Integer ID of the segment to retrieve segment overrides for.

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description:
* `ASC` - ASC
* `DESC` - DESC

parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description:
* `created_date` - created_date
* `name` - name

parameters.name: tag_strategy
parameters.description:
* `UNION` - UNION
* `INTERSECTION` - INTERSECTION

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma separated list of tag ids to filter on (AND with INTERSECTION, and OR with UNION via tag_strategy)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
Feature type to filter on (STANDARD or MULTIVARIATE).

* `STANDARD` - STANDARD
* `MULTIVARIATE` - MULTIVARIATE

parameters.name: value_search
parameters.description: Value of type int, string, or boolean to filter features based on their values

post.description: Creates a new feature flag in the specified project with default settings.

schema.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

get.description: Retrieves code references and usage information for the feature flag.
Retrieves external resources linked to the feature flag.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

get.description: Retrieves all multivariate options for a feature flag.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

post.description: Creates a new multivariate option for a feature flag.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this multivariate feature option.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this multivariate feature option.

schema.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

put.description: Updates feature flag properties such as name and description.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature.

schema.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

get.description: Retrieves evaluation data and analytics for a specific feature flag.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this feature.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: number of days

schema.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

get.description: Retrieves all release pipelines configured for the specified project.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific release pipeline.

post.description: Adds a feature flag to a release pipeline for staged rollout.

get.description: Retrieves all user segments defined for audience targeting within the project.

parameters.name: identity
parameters.description: Optionally provide the id of an identity to get only the segments they match

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search term to find segment with given term in their name

post.description: Creates a new user segment for audience targeting within the project.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific user segment.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this segment.

put.description: Updates an existing user segment's properties and rules.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this segment.

ActionTypeEnum.description:
* `TOGGLE_FEATURE` - Enable/Disable Feature for the environment
* `UPDATE_FEATURE_VALUE` - Update Feature Value for the environment
* `TOGGLE_FEATURE_FOR_SEGMENT` - Enable/Disable Feature for a specific segment
* `UPDATE_FEATURE_VALUE_FOR_SEGMENT` - Update Feature Value for a specific segment
* `PHASED_ROLLOUT` - Create Phased Rollout

AggregationEnum.description:
* `count` - Count
* `sum` - Sum
* `mean` - Mean
* `occurrence` - Occurrence (event happened at least once)

ConditionOperatorEnum.description:
* `EQUAL` - Exactly Matches
* `GREATER_THAN` - Greater than
* `LESS_THAN` - Less than
* `CONTAINS` - Contains
* `GREATER_THAN_INCLUSIVE` - Greater than or equal to
* `LESS_THAN_INCLUSIVE` - Less than or equal to
* `NOT_CONTAINS` - Does not contain
* `NOT_EQUAL` - Does not match
* `REGEX` - Matches regex
* `PERCENTAGE_SPLIT` - Percentage split
* `MODULO` - Modulo Operation
* `IS_SET` - Is set
* `IS_NOT_SET` - Is not set
* `IN` - In

DirectionEnum.description:
* `up` - Higher is better
* `down` - Lower is better
* `informational` - Informational only

EdgeV2MigrationStatusEnum.description:
* `NOT_STARTED` - Not Started
* `IN_PROGRESS` - In Progress
* `COMPLETE` - Complete
* `INCOMPLETE` - Incomplete (identity overrides skipped)

feature_states_to_create.description: Array of feature states that will be created in the new version. Note: these can only include segment overrides.

feature_states_to_update.description: Array of feature states to update in the new version.

segment_ids_to_delete_overrides.description: List of segment ids for which the segment overrides will be removed in the new version.

publish_immediately.description: Boolean to confirm whether the new version should be publish immediately or not.

EnvironmentSerializerWithMetadata.description: Functionality for serializers that need to handle metadata

project.description: Changing the project selected will remove all previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Features that are related to this Environment. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Features for this Environment.

allow_client_traits.description: Allows clients using the client API key to set traits.

banner_colour.description: hex code for the banner colour

hide_disabled_flags.description: If true will exclude flags from SDK which are disabled. NOTE: If set, this will override the project `hide_disabled_flags`

use_mv_v2_evaluation.description:
To avoid breaking the API, we return this field as well.

Warning: this will still mean that sending the `use_mv_v2_evaluation` field
(e.g. in a PUT request) will not behave as expected but, since this is a minor
issue, I think we can ignore.

use_identity_composite_key_for_hashing.description: Enable this to have consistent multivariate and percentage split evaluations across all SDKs (in local and server side mode)

hide_sensitive_data.description: If true, will hide sensitive data(e.g: traits, description etc) from the SDK endpoints

use_identity_overrides_in_local_eval.description: When enabled, identity overrides will be included in the environment document

is_creating.description: Attribute used to indicate when an environment is still being created (via clone for example)

ExpectedDirectionEnum.description:
* `increase` - Increase
* `decrease` - Decrease
* `not_increase` - Should not increase
* `not_decrease` - Should not decrease

FeatureExternalResourceTypeEnum.description:
* `GITHUB_ISSUE` - GitHub Issue
* `GITHUB_PR` - GitHub PR
* `GITLAB_ISSUE` - GitLab Issue
* `GITLAB_MR` - GitLab MR

FeatureLifecycleCounts.description: Number of features in each lifecycle stage for an environment

identifier.description: Can be passed as an alternative to `identity`

LifecycleStageEnum.description:
* `new` - new
* `live` - live
* `stale` - stale
* `permanent` - permanent
* `needs_monitoring` - needs_monitoring
* `to_remove` - to_remove

ListFeature.description: Functionality for serializers that need to handle metadata

project.description: Changing the project selected will remove previous Feature States for the previously associated projects Environments that are related to this Feature. New default Feature States will be created for the new selected projects Environments for this Feature. Also this will remove any Tags associated with a feature as Tags are Project defined

num_segment_overrides.description: Number of segment overrides that exist for the given feature in the environment provided by the `environment` query parameter.

num_identity_overrides.description: Number of identity overrides that exist for the given feature in the environment provided by the `environment` query parameter. Note: will return null for Edge enabled projects.

last_modified_in_any_environment.description: Datetime representing the last time that the feature was modified in any environment in the given project. Note: requires feature versioning v2 enabled on the environment.

last_modified_in_current_environment.description: Datetime representing the last time that the feature was modified in any environment in the current environment. Note: requires that the environment query parameter is passed and feature versioning v2 enabled on the environment.

is_default.description: If set to true, all new users will be added to this group

external_id.description: Unique ID of the group in an external system

items.description:
A lightweight view of an experiment using a metric, as returned in the
metric's ``experiments`` field.

key.description: A stable, human-readable identifier for the variant.
A stable, human-readable identifier for the variant.

persist_trait_data.description: Disable this if you don't want Flagsmith to store trait data for this org's identities.

block_access_to_admin.description: Enable this to block all the access to admin interface for the organisation

hide_disabled_flags.description: If true will exclude flags from SDK which are disabled

enable_dynamo_db.description: If true will sync environment data with dynamodb and allow access to dynamodb identities

migration_status.description: Edge migration status of the project; can be one of: MIGRATION_SCHEDULED, MIGRATION_COMPLETED, MIGRATION_IN_PROGRESS, MIGRATION_NOT_STARTED, NOT_APPLICABLE

prevent_flag_defaults.description: Prevent defaults from being set in all environments when creating a feature.

enable_realtime_updates.description: Enable this to trigger a realtime(sse) event whenever the value of a flag changes

only_allow_lower_case_feature_names.description: Used by UI to validate feature names

stale_flags_limit_days.description: Number of days without modification in any environment before a flag is considered stale.

edge_v2_migration_status.description:
[Edge V2 migration] Project migration status. Set to `IN_PROGRESS` to trigger migration start.

* `NOT_STARTED` - Not Started
* `IN_PROGRESS` - In Progress
* `COMPLETE` - Complete
* `INCOMPLETE` - Incomplete (identity overrides skipped)

enforce_feature_owners.description: Require at least one user or group owner when creating a feature.

hide_disabled_flags.description: If true will exclude flags from SDK which are disabled

enable_dynamo_db.description: If true will sync environment data with dynamodb and allow access to dynamodb identities

migration_status.description: Edge migration status of the project; can be one of: MIGRATION_SCHEDULED, MIGRATION_COMPLETED, MIGRATION_IN_PROGRESS, MIGRATION_NOT_STARTED, NOT_APPLICABLE

prevent_flag_defaults.description: Prevent defaults from being set in all environments when creating a feature.

enable_realtime_updates.description: Enable this to trigger a realtime(sse) event whenever the value of a flag changes

only_allow_lower_case_feature_names.description: Used by UI to validate feature names

stale_flags_limit_days.description: Number of days without modification in any environment before a flag is considered stale.

edge_v2_migration_status.description:
[Edge V2 migration] Project migration status. Set to `IN_PROGRESS` to trigger migration start.

* `NOT_STARTED` - Not Started
* `IN_PROGRESS` - In Progress
* `COMPLETE` - Complete
* `INCOMPLETE` - Incomplete (identity overrides skipped)

enforce_feature_owners.description: Require at least one user or group owner when creating a feature.

max_segments_allowed.description: Max segments allowed for this project

max_features_allowed.description: Max features allowed for this project

max_segment_overrides_allowed.description: Max segments overrides allowed for any (one) environment within this project

ProjectUpdate.description:
Mixin to add read only status to fields in a given serializer based on the existence
of a subscription and a black list of plan ids

Example usage:

    class MySerializer(ReadOnlyIfNotValidPlanMixin, ModelSerializer):
        class Meta:
            model = MyModel
            fields = ("my_field",)

        invalid_plans = ("free",)
        field_names = ("my_field",)

        def get_subscription(self):
            return subscription

V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseSegmentCond.description: Represents a condition within a segment rule used by Flagsmith engine.
V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseSegmentCond.title: SegmentCondition

V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseSegmentRule.description: Represents a rule within a segment used by Flagsmith engine. Root rules usually contain nested rules.
V1EnvironmentDocumentResponseSegmentRule.title: SegmentRule

feature_states_to_update.description: List of feature states to update as part of this change.

feature_states_to_create.description: List of feature states to create as part of this change.

segment_ids_to_delete_overrides.description: List of segment IDs for which the overrides should be deleted as part of this change.
